title: vault get() uses zero-allocation JSON navigation instead of serde_json
description: vault/src/lib.rs get() wraps the raw response bytes in a SecretValue immediately, then uses secretx-core's extract_path_field / extract_path navigators to find the data. No serde_json::Value is created for the secret content. This avoids allocating non-Zeroizing String copies of secret bytes in heap memory. A future contributor might suggest 'simplify by using serde_json::from_slice' — that would create un-zeroized copies of the secret and should be rejected on security grounds.
